title: Better craftable totem
description: A simple mod that adds a straightforward recipe for crafting a totem of undying
body:
## **Better Craftable Totems**
Better Craftable Totems is a simple utility mod that adds a crafting recipe for the Totem of Undying.

This mod offers an alternative method for obtaining Totems for players who prefer resource gathering over exploring Woodland Mansions or triggering Raids. It utilizes standard vanilla materials to ensure the item remains accessible but retains a material cost balanced for survival gameplay.

**Functionality**

The mod introduces a single recipe to the game. It does not alter existing loot tables or mob drops.

**Crafting Costs:** To craft one Totem of Undying, you will need:

- 4 Gold Blocks
  
- 2 Emeralds

**Technical Info**

- Dependencies: None.
  
- Compatibility: This mod works with existing worlds and is compatible with other mods.
  
- Modpacks: You may include this mod in any modpack without permission.
